use_cases: Creative professional portfolio landing page showcasing personal brand
Designer portfolio section with frosted glass aesthetic and motion animations
Personal brand hero for showcasing collaborations, availability, and latest work
ai_summary: A glassmorphism portfolio hero block featuring frosted glass visual effects, animated list reveals with staggered transitions, social media links, and professional highlights. Designed for creative professionals to showcase their personal brand, collaborations, and availability on landing pages with desktop and mobile responsive support.
